title: Design System: Costa Brava Rent a Boat

display.purpose: Hero headlines only. Uppercase, tight tracking. Always white on photography or Coastal Navy on light surfaces.

headline.purpose: Section headings, page titles. The primary structural level.

title.purpose: Card titles, boat names, step labels. The workhorse heading level.

body.purpose: Descriptions, paragraphs, form labels. Max line length 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Badges, meta text, timestamps, auxiliary info.

shadows.name: xs
shadows.purpose: Default resting shadow for outline buttons.

shadows.name: elevated
shadows.purpose: Primary CTA buttons at rest. The signature floating shadow.

shadows.name: elevated-hover
shadows.purpose: CTA hover state. Deeper, wider. Paired with translateY(-2px).

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for button hover/active, color transitions.

motion.name: ease-smooth
motion.purpose: Card tilt, social proof transitions. Overshoots slightly for tactile feel.

motion.name: pulse-cta
motion.purpose: CTA ring breathing animation. Scale 1 to 1.15 with opacity fade.

motion.name: pulse-urgency
motion.purpose: Scarcity dot opacity pulse. 1 to 0.4 and back.

components.name: Primary CTA Button
components.description: The signature pill button with floating shadow and breathing ring. Used for booking CTAs and primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1a1a3e; color: #fff; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; position: relative; box-shadow: 0 4px 14px hsl(215 45% 20% / 0.35); transition: transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease; will-change: transform, box-shadow; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px hsl(215 45% 20% / 0.45); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px hsl(215 45% 20% / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1fb8a8; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary::after { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: 0; border-radius: inherit; border: 2px solid rgba(26, 26, 62, 0.6); animation: ds-cta-ring 2s ease-out infinite; pointer-events: none; } @keyframes ds-cta-ring { 0% { transform: scale(1); opacity: 1; } 70% { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 0; } 100% { transform: scale(1.15); opacity: 0; } }

components.name: Secondary Button (Outline)
components.description: Transparent pill with subtle border. Used for secondary actions alongside the primary CTA.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: #1f3044; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid rgba(0,0,0,0.10); border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: rgba(31,48,68,0.30); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1fb8a8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Invisible button that reveals itself on hover with an underline. The quietest action available.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #1f3044; padding: 10px 24px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { text-decoration: underline; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1fb8a8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input with rounded-md corners (not pill). 44px height matches button alignment.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; height: 44px; padding: 12px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 400; color: #1f3044; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #c4cdd5; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 0.2s ease; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #5a6b7a; } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #1fb8a8; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Badge (Default)
components.description: Small pill-shaped status indicator. Never interactive.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1f3044; background: rgba(31,48,68,0.10); border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; }

components.name: Badge (Popular)
components.description: Amber badge for popular boats. Full saturation, used on card images.
components.css: .ds-badge-popular { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #451a03; background: #f59e0b; border-radius: 9999px; white-space: nowrap; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); }

components.name: Floating Navigation Bar
components.description: Frosted pill bar fixed near the top of the viewport. The most distinctive structural element.
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 12px 24px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.95); backdrop-filter: blur(24px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(24px); border: 1px solid #e4e8eb; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px -1px hsl(210 15% 25% / 0.05); } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(31,48,68,0.70); cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #1f3044; } .ds-nav-active { color: #1f3044; font-weight: 600; } .ds-nav-cta { background: #1a1a3e; color: #fff; padding: 8px 24px; font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease; } .ds-nav-cta:hover { background: rgba(26,26,62,0.90); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible, .ds-nav-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #1fb8a8; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Boat Card
components.description: Product card with 3D perspective tilt on hover, image zoom, and floating badges. The primary browsing element.
components.html:
Popular

Trimarchi 57S

5.7m · 40CV · 7 personas

Desde 89€/hora
components.css: .ds-boat-card { background: #f2f5f7; border: 1px solid #e8ecef; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-boat-card:hover { transform: perspective(800px) rotateY(2deg) scale(1.015); } .ds-boat-card-img { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; overflow: hidden; } .ds-boat-card-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; transition: transform 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1); } .ds-boat-card:hover .ds-boat-card-img img { transform: scale(1.03); } .ds-boat-card-body { padding: 16px; } .ds-boat-card-title { font-family: 'Clash Display', 'Archivo', sans-serif; font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 500; color: #1f3044; margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-boat-card-meta { font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5a6b7a; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-boat-card-price { font-family: 'Archivo', Inter, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #5a6b7a; margin: 0; } .ds-boat-card-price strong { color: #1a1a3e; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 600; }

narrative.overview:
What remains after a day on the water: warmth on the skin, the smell of salt, light reflecting off a surface that never stays still. This design system captures that afterglow. It is not about the boat. It is about the feeling of having been out there, and the pull to go back.

The system rejects three things by name. It is not a luxury yacht charter site (too cold, too aspirational, too much marble and gold). It is not a budget excursion aggregator (clip art, stock photos, screaming prices). It is not a generic travel platform (Booking.com templates, conversion-machine UI, soulless grids). The Salt Memory sits in the space between: professional enough to trust with your family, warm enough to feel like a recommendation from someone who lives here.

Surfaces are quiet. Photography carries emotion. Typography is confident without shouting. The palette is coastal but never obvious. Interactions feel tactile: buttons that respond, cards that breathe, a system that rewards touch.
keyCharacteristics: Light mode. A tourist on the beach in July, phone tilted against the sun. High contrast is not optional.
Mobile-first. Most visitors browse on phones. Every element is designed for thumbs, not cursors.
Photography-led. The sea sells itself. The interface recedes.
Pill-shaped CTAs as the signature interactive element.
Flat by default, elevated on interaction. Depth is earned, not decorative.
GPU-composited motion only. Transform and opacity. Nothing else animates.

rules.name: The Quiet Surface Rule
rules.body: Backgrounds never compete with photography. Card backgrounds stay within 3% lightness of the page background. If a surface is louder than the image on it, the surface is wrong.

rules.name: The One Action Rule
rules.body: Deep Navy CTA appears on at most two interactive elements per viewport. Its rarity is what makes it unmissable. Secondary actions use outline or ghost variants.

rules.name: The Weight Ladder Rule
rules.body: Adjacent hierarchy levels must differ by at least one weight step (100 units) AND one size step (ratio >= 1.25). Flat hierarchy (same weight, different size only) is prohibited.

rules.name: The Earned Depth Rule
rules.body: Shadows appear only as a response to state: hover, focus, active, open. A card at rest has no shadow. A card being hovered gets sm. A modal gets lg. If a surface has a shadow and no interaction caused it, the shadow is wrong.

dos: Do use pill-shaped buttons (rounded-full) for every interactive action.
Do let photography fill at least 40% of above-the-fold viewport on landing pages.
Do test every color pairing at WCAG AA (4.5:1 for text, 3:1 for large text).
Do use GPU-composited properties only for animation (transform, opacity).
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion by killing all animation and scroll behavior.
Do disable hover transforms on touch devices via @media (hover: none).
Do use Clash Display for headings and Archivo for body. Never swap their roles.
donts: Don't make it look like a luxury yacht charter. No gold accents, no black marble textures, no script fonts.
Don't make it look like a budget excursion site. No clip art, no densely packed grids, no flashing price banners.
Don't make it look like a generic travel platform. No Booking.com-style search bars, no infinite card grids.
Don't add decorative shadows to resting surfaces (The Earned Depth Rule).
Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as colored accent stripes.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradients).
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. Navigation backdrop-blur is the only permitted use.
Don't animate CSS layout properties. Transform and opacity only.
Don't use #000 or #fff anywhere. Every neutral is tinted toward the coastal navy hue.
Don't use em dashes in copy.
